## Introductory Summary From The Page

- The page describes Evan, also known as Heeseung, as a South Korean singer-songwriter under Belift Lab.
- It describes him as a former member of ENHYPEN.
- It says he is known for having been a contestant on the survival show I-LAND.
- It says he will make his solo debut on June 22, 2026 with the digital single "Ride or Die". This date is future-dated relative to the access date of June 14, 2026.

## Career Timeline

- On June 1, 2020, he was introduced as a contestant on CJ ENM and Big Hit Entertainment's survival show I-LAND under the name Heeseung.
- He was a trainee from Big Hit Entertainment, now known as Big Hit Music.
- On September 18, 2020, he ranked fifth by global votes and became a member of ENHYPEN.
- On November 30, 2020, he debuted in ENHYPEN with the group's first mini album, Border : Day One.
- On March 10, 2026, Belift Lab announced that Heeseung would depart from ENHYPEN after in-depth discussions with the group about future direction and goals.
- According to the page's summary of Belift Lab's statement, Heeseung had a distinct musical vision, and the agency decided to respect it.
- The page says ENHYPEN would continue as a six-member group while Heeseung prepared for a solo debut under Belift Lab.
- Sometime in March 2026, Belift Lab added Heeseung to its website as a soloist under his birth name, Lee Heeseung.
- In March 2026, he also hinted during a fan call that his solo music would be released soon.
- On April 8, 2026, he launched solo SNS accounts.
- At the same time, Belift Lab changed his website profile to Evan, signaling the new stage name.
- On May 11, 2026, Belift Lab announced that Evan was preparing for a June solo debut.
- On June 11, 2026, it was announced that his debut would be on June 22, 2026 with "Ride or Die".

## Personal Life

- The page lists Lee Hee-do as Evan's older brother.

## Health

- On November 3, 2021, Belift Lab released a statement saying that Heeseung had undergone surgery on November 1, 2021 for an epidermoid cyst on his right toe.
- The page says he would rest for at least one week.
- The page also says he would still participate in the then-upcoming fan meeting on November 19, 2021.

## Trivia

- The page explains Evan as a stage name representing another dimension of his identity and the essence of his musical artistry.
- The page says the Evan persona is meant to share music shaped by his own unique color and emotional depth.
- In the first episode of I-LAND, he performed "Boss" by NCT U.
- The page lists his MBTI personality type as INFJ.
- Before I-LAND, he trained for three years.
- The page says he is currently roommates with Jay, Sunghoon, and NI-KI.
- On I-LAND, he received the highest individual mark given by the producers, scoring 93 for his "Fake Love" performance.
- If he had not become an idol, he would have been an English teacher.
- His favorite ramen is Shin Ramyun.

1. His blood type is A. When he was little, he was misunderstood a lot because of his blood type.
2. Height: In 2022, he said he was 180 cm barefoot. Later, in 2024, the company announced his barefoot height as 181.5 cm.
3. He likes purple. In 2020, he used a purple iPhone 12.
4. The backpack he carried during I-LAND was bought by his mother, and he had used it for many years.
5. He did not pass his arts high school audition because he was introverted and did not know how to show himself well. But as soon as he walked out, the Big Hit rookie development team noticed him because of his good looks and signed him. He was wearing a long red padded coat at the time.
6. During his trainee days, he would cry if he could not meet his own expectations. In less than three years of training, he was always first among his peers and was called "the idol and role model of trainees."

7. When he first joined the company, he had no dance foundation and was teased for looking like a squid.
8. At first, the company noticed his vocal talent and trained him as a main vocalist. Gradually, they also discovered his talent for dance, which shocked people inside the company.
9. In high school, he studied while also training. Influenced by his older brother, his grades were pretty good, and he was always quietly doing his own things.
10. His English grades were very good. If he had not debuted, he would have gone to a language school and become an English teacher.
11. At his high school festival, he covered BTS's "DNA." He had asked the company in advance and received permission.
12. Before debut, he already had a small fan club of about 40 people, but Heeseung himself did not know he was popular.

13. Before his third year of middle school, he received 10,000 won a week as allowance. After he became a trainee, the company gave him a stipend, and from then on he never asked his family for allowance again.
14. During his trainee days, he liked practicing at dawn and often practiced through the night.
15. During his trainee days, he rented a place outside on his own, then rode a shared bike along the Han River for 40 minutes to get to the company for practice.
16. He once worked a part-time job handing out shoes at an ice rink, filling in for his older brother's shift. He feels regretful that he did not have other part-time job experiences.
17. His parents are known as a very good-looking and well-matched couple.
18. When he was little, everyone said Heeseung looked like his father. After growing up, he became almost a copy of his mother and looks very much like her.

19. As a child, he was a mischievous kid who worried his mother.
20. He is very close to his mother and shares his worries with her. These days, when he has time off, he watches TV with her or holds her hand while walking around the market together.
21. His father and older brother both graduated from Korea University. He often played basketball in the neighborhood with his father and brother.
22. As a child, he lacked confidence about becoming a singer. His father kept supporting and encouraging him to keep trying, and in the end he entered Big Hit.
23. His father is Heeseung's role model: "Rather than giving advice, he is the kind of person who helps directly without saying much. He is still the person I rely on the most, and no matter when, I want to become someone like him."
24. Heeseung can memorize the phone numbers of people close to him, including his father, mother, older brother, and close friends.

25. He likes basketball. When he was little, during a game, the situation was not going well and comments from the audience made him cry from frustration. Then he shot an airball and was substituted out.
26. In Slam Dunk, he thinks he is like Ryota Miyagi because the character has an older brother. When watching the part where Ryota Miyagi's older brother dies, he almost cried, but Jake was beside him, so he felt embarrassed and held it in.
27. His favorite superhero movie is Big Hero 6, which is also a movie involving an older brother.
28. He chose number 39 for his baseball jacket because 39 was the number his older brother used when playing soccer.
29. He likes playing League of Legends. He plays mid, jungle, and support roles, and likes playing Zed and Thresh. He once solo-killed Faker with Zed, though Faker was going easy.
30. He once made up his mind and deleted his League of Legends account, but later created a new account and started playing again.

31. Recently, he has liked playing The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom.
32. Lee Heeseung has never said that he has played Genshin Impact, and there is no content proving that he has played the game.
33. When he plays games, he is very quiet; only the sound of the keyboard can be heard.
34. He watches animated shows, but not very deeply. He usually only watches whatever is popular at the time.
35. Even after debut, he has occasionally taken the subway to work and bought Japanese-style mini buns from the subway station to eat.
36. He is sensitive to caffeine. Coffee makes his heart beat faster, so he prefers peach iced tea.

37. He likes eating ramyeon. He previously said his favorite was Shin Ramyun because it is spicy; recently he said he likes Neoguri.
38. Heeseung originally had mild nearsightedness and had vision correction surgery in early 2022.
39. He does not really like going out. He did not even go out sightseeing in Tokyo or New York.
40. His MBTI has changed many times, and now it is ISTP. Heeseung does not really agree with MBTI's simple categorization of people's personalities.
41. In October 2021, he had surgery for a cyst on his foot.
42. He does not like ENGENEs listening to AI versions of himself singing. He wants to sing for everyone himself.

43. His memory is relatively poor, and he has lost earphones many times. He once bought new earphones and new clothes in the United States, then forgot all of them at the hotel and did not bring them back.
44. He is decisive when shopping and can choose things very quickly.
45. He does not like working out because he thinks it is too tiring. He has said several times that he likes his current body shape.
46. He used to be someone who did not carry bags. Later, after endorsing Prada and receiving a birthday gift, he often carried his birthday gift bag.
47. He is also very talented at skiing and could go straight onto very steep slopes. He chose an all-pink ski outfit and a fluffy hat for himself.
48. In front of the camera, he is relatively introverted and does not talk much, but privately he is the one who talks the most and is the funniest.
49. Sometimes he wonders why his name is Lee Heeseung. He thinks it is fascinating and really likes his name.

1. A 型血。小时候因为血型被误解了很多。
2. 身高：在 2022 年自己的说法是光脚 180cm，后来 2024 年公司公布为光脚 181.5cm。
3. 喜欢紫色。2020 年使用的是紫色 iPhone 12。
4. 参加 I-LAND 时背的书包是妈妈给买的书包，已经背了很多年。
5. 艺高面试时因为内向、不懂如何展现自己而没有考上，但是一出门就因为脸太好看，被 Big Hit 的新人开发组带走签约了。（当时身穿红色长款羽绒服）
6. 练习生时期如果达不到自己内心的预期就会哭。练习不到三年的时间里一直是同期的第一，是“练习生的偶像和榜样”。

7. 刚进公司的时候舞蹈是零基础，被嘲笑像鱿鱼。
8. 一开始公司就发现他在 vocal 上很有天赋，作为主唱培养；后来又渐渐发现他舞蹈也很有天赋，公司内部都感到震惊。
9. 高中时期一边做练习生一边读书，受到哥哥影响成绩还不错，总是很安静地做自己的事情。
10. 英语成绩很好。如果不出道，会去语言学校，做英语老师。
11. 在高中校庆的时候 cover 了 BTS 的《DNA》（已提前请示公司并获得允许）。
12. 出道前就已经有小规模的 fan club（40 人左右），但是羲承自己不知道自己很有人气。

13. 初三之前一个星期有一万韩元的零花钱；从成为练习生开始，公司会发补贴，之后再也没有跟家里要过零花钱。
14. 练习生时期很喜欢凌晨练习，经常通宵练习。
15. 练习生时期自己在外面租房子住，然后沿着汉江骑 40 分钟共享单车到公司练习。
16. 在溜冰场做过分鞋子的兼职（替哥哥班），实际上因为没有其他兼职经历而觉得很遗憾。
17. 爸爸妈妈是很出名的善男信女（因为长得很好看、很般配）。
18. 小时候大家都说羲承长得像爸爸，长大之后完全变成了妈妈的翻版，跟妈妈长得非常像。

19. 小时候是让妈妈苦恼的调皮小孩。
20. 跟妈妈关系很亲近，会跟妈妈分享烦恼。现在休假的话会跟妈妈一起看电视，或者拉着妈妈的手一起逛市场。
21. 爸爸和哥哥都是高丽大学的毕业生，跟爸爸哥哥经常会在小区里一起打篮球。
22. 小时候一直对做歌手这件事没有自信，是爸爸一直支持和鼓励羲承继续尝试，最后进了 Big Hit。
23. 爸爸是羲承的榜样：“比起给建议，是那种不说什么话直接给予帮助的人，现在也是我最依赖的人，无论什么时候都想成为跟他一样的人。”
24. 羲承可以背下身边亲近人的电话号码，包括爸爸、妈妈、哥哥还有好朋友的。

25. 喜欢打篮球。小时候参加比赛，因为局势不好被观众说风凉话给气哭了，然后打出一个三不沾被换下场了。
26. 《灌篮高手》里认为自己像宫城良田，因为这个角色有亲哥哥。看《灌篮高手》里宫城良田哥哥死掉的时候差点就哭了，但是 Jake 在身边，觉得不好意思哭，又忍住了。
27. 最喜欢的超英电影是《超能陆战队》（又是有哥哥的电影）。
28. 棒球服号码选择了 39 号，因为哥哥以前踢足球时候的号码是 39 号。
29. 喜欢玩 LOL，是中、野、辅角色（喜欢玩劫和锤石），用劫单杀过 Faker（放水版）。
30. 曾经下定决心注销过 LOL 账号，结果后来又注册了新的账号重新开始玩。

31. 最近喜欢玩《塞尔达传说：王国之泪》。
32. 李羲承从来没有说过自己玩过《原神》，并且也没有任何物料可以证明他玩过这个游戏。
33. 打游戏的时候很安静，只有按键盘的声音。
34. 会看动画片，但是看的不深入，只会看当下比较热门的动画片。
35. 出道后也偶尔会坐地铁上班，并且会买地铁站里的日式小馒头吃。
36. 对咖啡因不耐受，喝了咖啡会心跳加速，所以比较偏爱喝桃子冰茶。

37. 喜欢吃拉面。之前说最喜欢辛拉面，因为有辣味；最近说喜欢小浣熊。
38. 羲承原本是有一点近视的，2022 年初做了近视眼手术。
39. 不太喜欢出门，甚至在东京和纽约都没出门玩。
40. MBTI 变了很多次，现在是 ISTP。羲承不是很认可 MBTI 对人性格简单的划分。
41. 2021 年 10 月份做过脚部囊肿手术。
42. 不喜欢恩静听 AI 的自己唱歌，想自己唱给大家听。

43. 记性比较差，丢过很多次耳机。曾经在美国买了新耳机、新衣服，结果全都忘在酒店里没带回。
44. 买东西很爽快，很快速就能选好。
45. 不喜欢健身，觉得太累了，多次表示比较喜欢自己现在的身材。
46. 以前是无包一族，后来代言了 Prada，收到了生日礼物，于是经常背自己的生日礼物。
47. 滑雪也非常有天赋，直接就可以上很陡的山坡。自己选了一套纯粉色的滑雪服和毛绒帽子。
48. 在镜头面前会比较内向、话很少，但是私下是话最多、最有趣的。
49. 有时候会想自己为什么叫李羲承这个名字，觉得很神奇，很喜欢自己的名字。

1. His kindergarten was Dream Tree Kindergarten, his elementary school was Huafeng Elementary School, and his high school was Gwangnam High School.
2. The signature he originally designed was a deer with "hs" written on it, but people could not tell it was a deer, so he gave up on it.
3. Heeseung came up with the hand gesture for "connect."
4. He talks in his sleep.
5. He prefers cream-filled bungeoppang over red-bean bungeoppang.
6. When he was little, he had a snowball fight with classmates. A classmate wrapped stones in snow, and Heeseung got hit. He said it hurt especially badly when it hit his body.

7. He stopped believing in Santa Claus at age six because the note Santa left in a book had exactly the same handwriting as his mother.
8. He checks his New Year's fortune on Naver.
9. During his trainee days, he saw BTS concerts three times, including The Wings and Love Yourself, and was deeply moved. Afterward, he went back and ate fried chicken with the other trainees, toasted with Coke, and said, "Let's keep going, us."
10. He first ate bungeoppang when he was seven or eight. He smelled it while passing by and asked his mother, "What is that? I want it too."
11. He once brought the PS4 from home to the dorm and played it with the members.
12. During his trainee days, he often went to COEX as soon as practice ended, and he would even go late at night.

13. When he has mouth ulcers, he uses Albothyl, a medicine used in Korea.
14. Right after debut, the chat room name was "Heedeung," according to the members themselves.
15. During promotions for the first album, he took photos of the waiting room on his phone so he could keep the memories and look back on them seven years later.
16. He did not receive many awards as a child. The only one he remembers is an encouragement award in middle school.
17. Up until middle school, he did not study much, but his English was pretty good.
18. Between math and science, he chooses neither and picks English.

19. At his first fan meeting, he was so shy that when he saw his fans waving, he would make eye contact and then look away.
20. Compared with waffles and bungeoppang, he prefers kkwabaegi, which is similar to a twisted doughnut.
21. In high school, he made time to join the dance club and the musical theater club.
22. He only posts photos he is satisfied with on Weverse.
23. After watching a performance by Colde from offonoff, he thought he was so cool that he went to a salon and got a perm.
24. He has traveled to Okinawa and Hong Kong with his family.

25. When he is tired, he falls asleep as soon as he lies down and can fall asleep in 10 seconds.
26. He started dreaming of becoming a singer at age six. Before preparing for high school, his father encouraged him to try one last time. He auditioned for an arts high school but was eliminated. However, at the school gate, he was cast by six or seven companies. In the end, he chose Big Hit because they could sign a contract the fastest, and he officially became a trainee in 2017.
27. When brushing his teeth, he starts from the lower left side first. Truly TMI.
28. He has a body type that does not gain weight easily. He said he had to work hard at eating to gain cheek fat, which has now disappeared.
29. His stance on mint chocolate is that he does not dislike it, but he would not specifically buy it to eat either.
30. He watched the "FEVER" MV for an hour.

31. He was very hard to raise as a child.
32. He has the nickname "Yongsan Kang Beomwon."
33. During Chuseok, he goes to his grandmother's house and drinks sikhye.
34. When he was little, he looked like his father; after growing up, he looks like his mother.
35. His dream is to travel around the world.
36. On his birthday, he once received birthday cafe gifts, which were shown during his 2021 birthday live.

37. His MBTI changes a lot, but he personally does not believe in it and thinks MBTI cannot sum him up.
38. He does not have one specific music style, but he likes jazz and R&B the most.
39. His favorite amusement park ride is the drop tower, and he is very good at riding it.
40. Dean is his role model in life.

Food And Drink TMI

41. He likes strawberry macarons.
42. He first ate tanghulu in Busan and thought it was especially delicious. He likes strawberry tanghulu the most.
43. He likes Postick snacks, which are somewhat like potato sticks.
44. For ice cream, he likes the "Mom Is an Alien" and "Rainbow Sherbet" flavors from Baskin Robbins.
45. He especially likes cooking jajangmyeon and Neoguri ramen together.
46. He likes eating beef intestine.

Food And Drink TMI

47. He often ate Choco Blanc chocolate cookies in the practice room.
48. During his trainee days, he ate Sulbing many times. He likes strawberry bingsu the most, and watermelon and red bean are also good.
49. During his trainee days, his three favorite drinks were Haitai pear juice, Trevi grapefruit flavor, and banana milk. Banana milk ranked third because the amount was too small.
50. During his trainee days, he especially liked drinking 갈아만든 pear juice and 비락식혜 sikhye, to the point that he drank them like water.

1. 幼儿园是梦之树幼儿园，小学是华峰小学，高中是广南高中
2. 本来设计的签名是一只鹿上面写了 hs，但是看不出是鹿所以放弃了
3. connect 的手势是羲承想出来的
4. 会说梦话
5. 比起红豆鲫鱼饼更喜欢奶油鲫鱼饼
6. 小时候和同学打雪仗，同学把石子包在雪里，羲承被打到了，说打在身上特别疼

7. 六岁就不相信圣诞老人了，因为圣诞老人留在书里的便签和妈妈的字迹一模一样
8. 会在 naver 上查新年运势
9. 练习生时期看过三次 bts 演唱会（the wings, love yourself）被震撼到了，回去和练习生一起吃了炸鸡，用可乐干杯说“加油吧，我们”
10. 第一次吃鲫鱼饼是七八岁，路过闻到了香味，和妈妈说“那是什么，我也要”
11. 之前把家里的 ps4 搬到宿舍和成员们一起玩
12. 练习生时期经常一结束就去 COEX，凌晨也会去

13. 口腔溃疡的时候会用 albothyl（韩国的药）
14. 刚出道聊天室的名字叫羲噔（成员自己说的）
15. 第一张专辑活动的时候，为了能留下回忆，用手机拍了待机室照片，准备存着七年以后看
16. 小时候没拿过什么奖状，只记得初中拿了鼓励奖
17. 到初中为止都没怎么学习，但是英语还不错
18. 数学 vs 科学，两个都不选选英语 🤌

19. 第一次 fm 太害羞了，看到自己的粉丝招手会对视然后躲开
20. 比起华夫饼和鲫鱼饼更喜欢꽈배기（类似麻花和糖饼）
21. 高中的时候抽时间参加了舞蹈社和音乐剧社
22. 只会把满意的照片发在 wvs 上
23. 看了 offonoff 的 colde 前辈的演出觉得太帅了，就去美容室烫头了

Setting work aside, I think dialogue and communication let me be influenced by other people, and little by little that helps me improve myself. I used to be a very emotional person, but now I think I have become a little more balanced.

Q: In the survey before ENHYPEN's leader selection, for questions like "the person you most want to see when things are hard" and "the person who takes the lead in doing things they do not like," HEESEUNG's name was always near the top.

A: I am someone who listens well to other people's worries. Saying it this way makes me sound a little self-satisfied. If it is something I can help them solve, I cannot really stand seeing someone be troubled by it. I get the thought, "I definitely have to help them," and it becomes something I do unconsciously.

201227

Q: It is clear that the other members trust and rely on older brother Heeseung. In daily life, what kind of older brother do you want to be?

A: I do not want everyone to think of me as an important older brother. After spending time in places like middle school, high school, and clubs, I felt that older people are not always easy to approach. So when I became part of a group with the members, I wanted the atmosphere for conversation to be relaxed. To the younger members, I am not some great older brother. I think I should become a cute older brother. If I am that kind of older brother, everyone can talk comfortably.

201227

Q: In I-LAND, Heeseung's older brother said, "When I think of the past you, the ordinary, immature, cute you who liked playing games with friends and did not like studying, I am so proud of who you are now."

A: Back then, I really was immature. Without exaggeration, everything has changed. This is a bit of TMI, but I have an old friend. When I went out with that friend, we would do a lot of quirky things together and live very innocently. I have matured a lot compared with then. Although I think I still need to become even more mature than I am now.

Q: In the "ENHYPEN October Month-End Settlement" video, you set a goal to practice vocals for one and a half to two hours every day, and even with a busy schedule, you achieved 70% to 80% of that goal.

A: When you are doing something you like, reaching a goal is easy. I usually put all of my energy into the things I like, but I do not have motivation for things I dislike. I think that is both a strength and a weakness. Taking studying as an example, in middle school I lost interest in studying, so I did not care much about most subjects. But I really liked English because I liked listening to pop songs. There was a high school near my home that admitted students only based on their English grades, and my English grades had already reached the admission standard.

Q: You did well. When ENHYPEN was deciding on a leader, your name kept coming up, and you also took the leader test. Was that also because you simply wanted to be a comfortable older brother to the members?

A: The members said it would be good if the older brother led us. But honestly, even if I were not the leader, I could still do that. This is the first time I am saying this, but there was a situation like that. If I became the leader, I worried that even if I could not notice problems in myself, I might still guide the team according to my own thoughts. I also worried that I might lose my original self that way. I was very worried that this kind of result could happen. If that happened, because there is an age gap between us, reducing disagreements would not be easy. So I worried about it for a long time, and after thinking about it, I felt that watching over the members and bringing them together as one whole was my role.

GQ：连接，发现，成长。对于这三个象征着 ENHYPEN 的词语，你最近有什么想说的吗？

羲承：我觉得随着时间的推移而成长，与人们保持紧密联系是非常重要的，因此我想特别指出发现这一词。在对自我发现以及寻找新事物的过程是我最近的兴趣。

GQ：你发现了什么？

羲承：非常简单，只是觉得我原来的想法变得更重要了。非常简单普通的事情。

211222

Q：羲承是 ENHYPEN 里的大哥，你认为自己的性格的优缺点是什么呢？

羲承：“我觉得如果是我想要珍惜的人，我就会全力以赴对 TA 好，这是我觉得比较好的一面，缺点就是对我来说能达到那种程度的人太少了”（笑）

220119

Q：在“Mnet Asia Music Awards”的颁奖礼上能感受到你变得更加自信了。

羲承：是的，以前会觉得在别人面前说话是一件很苦恼的事情，但是这个问题不是想想就能解决的，还需要多加努力才行，我现在对于诉说自己的事情的时候不会像之前一样那么别扭了，我所产生的想法立马和别人沟通就很舒服。

Q：但是在 MBC 的周偶里的个人简历写到，自己的优点有“很多”，缺点就是“没有缺点”（笑）

羲承：我认为如果把缺点写成没有的话是不是能成为提高自信感的办法呢？与其看缺点，不如把重心放在优点上，我所拥有的无限的可能性最好朝着我所想的方向前进就好了，然后把我的缺点变成优点，改变心态也许是一种简单但是又会有很大变化的方法，去对我自己而言，所抱有这种态度的话能解决更多问题。

220712

Q：不过练习的过程应该都很累，作为大哥有什么要说的话吗？

羲承：其实我没有使用我是大哥的角色而去说什么。也没有必要一定要说的。（笑）我也年轻，偶然地就成了大哥，我跟成员们并没有什么区别。虽然我也会给予他们力量，但同时我也有很多要向弟弟们学习的地方。反而因为我是哥哥去做什么的话，弟弟们也会不舒服的。

Q：这么看的话，你对工作变得更专业了？

羲承：好像变得更有建设性了。出道初期处于很多人之间，如果只从感情上想的话，什么都解决不了。因为想要更有逻辑地接近和判断，所以产生了那样的性格。可以构思想法，在工作上接近，于是会出现翻唱歌曲之类的结果。好像是在多次尝试的过程中，发挥出了那样的性格。

220823

Q：（笑）做得很好呢。ENHYPEN 决定队长的时候你一直被提，也做了队长测试吧。也是因为只是想做成员们舒适的哥哥才做的吗？

A：如果是哥哥来带领我们就好了，成员们这么说过。但其实就算我不是队长也可以做到这一点。这是第一次说这些呢，有过这样的情况。如果我担任队长的话，我担心可能在我察觉不到自身有问题的情况下依然按照我的想法来对团队进行引导，也担心这样会丢失我原本的样子，我很担心会有这样的结果。如果出现这种情况，我们之间也有年龄差，减少意见不合是挺不容易的事。因此我苦恼了很久，想了想觉得看着成员们并把他们凝聚成一个整体才是我的角色。

Q：自我客观化很出色呢。20 年代开始“理想中的我”和“实际的我”好像区分起来也不容易，竟然连“指责中的我”都怀疑了。

Q：自我客观化很出色呢。20 年代开始“理想中的我”和“实际的我”好像区分起来也不容易，竟然连“指责中的我”都怀疑了。

A：我也不太了解我自己。事实上我觉得自己是一个非常坚强的人，但最近看来好像变成了非常感性的人了。也有想要得到爱的地方。原来我在家里是忙内，所以我想有那样的一面。

Q：什么时候感受到了？

A：在舞台上（笑）做点什么的时候就会有期待“希望会有更多的呼应”

Q：那不是强者也能拥有的期待吗？

A：是的。但是比起自信，那个状态是更想要得到爱，从家人那里得到的预想也会在其他情况下得到满足。“啊，原来我是有那一面的人呀”，我也学到了很多。
